name: mcppedia
description: Discover, evaluate, and compare 17K+ MCP servers with security, maintenance, efficiency, documentation, and compatibility scores.
long_description: The MCPpedia extension gives Claude a catalog of every published MCP server with daily-refreshed quality and security scores. Search, compare, audit your installed servers, and get ready-to-paste install configs for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf.

tools.name: get_server_details
tools.description: Full server info + optional security report.

tools.name: get_category_tree
tools.description: Browse every category with server counts.

tools.name: what_changed
tools.description: Servers rescored since a given timestamp.

prompts.name: audit-my-mcp-setup
prompts.description: Audit every server you have installed.
